making.title: Making Jerky
making.intro: A practical workspace for documenting your complete jerky process.
making.select.title: Select and prepare meat
making.select.text: Use lean meat, remove visible fat and chill it before slicing.
making.slice.title: Slice consistently
making.slice.text: Keep slices even so every tray dries at a similar rate.
making.marinade.title: Marinate
making.marinade.text: Measure salt carefully, mix thoroughly and marinate refrigerated.
making.dry.title: Dry and verify
making.dry.text: Arrange without overlap, run the selected profile and verify texture and weight loss.
making.placeholder: Add your own findings, photos and videos here as the process evolves.
making.video_text: See the complete practical jerky-making process.

ingredient_descriptions.salt: Basic seasoning that strengthens flavor and helps control water activity.
ingredient_descriptions.curing_salt: Nitrite curing salt for cured meats. Measure precisely and follow the manufacturer's dosage.
ingredient_descriptions.sugar: Balances salt and heat while supporting browning during drying.
ingredient_descriptions.cane_sugar: Aromatic unrefined sugar with mild caramel and molasses notes.
ingredient_descriptions.water: Dilutes the marinade and distributes salt and spices evenly.
ingredient_descriptions.soy_sauce: Adds salt, umami and fermented depth.
ingredient_descriptions.orange_juice: Adds acidity, sweetness and fresh citrus aroma.
ingredient_descriptions.chili: Hot pepper providing heat and a fruity aroma.
ingredient_descriptions.anise: Sweet, warm spice with a liquorice aroma.
ingredient_descriptions.star_anise: Powerful sweet spice with liquorice notes; use sparingly.
ingredient_descriptions.ginger: Warm, fresh and lightly citrus spice.
ingredient_descriptions.cinnamon: Sweet woody spice that adds warmth and complexity.
ingredient_descriptions.nutmeg: Warm, sweet and slightly earthy spice.
ingredient_descriptions.oregano: Herbal, slightly bitter seasoning for savory marinades.
ingredient_descriptions.smoked_paprika: Sweet pepper powder with smoke aroma and deep red color.
ingredient_descriptions.sweet_paprika: Mild red pepper powder adding color and sweetness.
ingredient_descriptions.cayenne_pepper: Clean, direct heat useful for controlling spice intensity.
ingredient_descriptions.sichuan_pepper: Citrusy spice known for its tingling sensation.
ingredient_descriptions.black_pepper: Sharp, woody and aromatic foundation spice.
ingredient_descriptions.thyme: Earthy herbal spice with a dry, savory aroma.
ingredient_descriptions.caraway: Warm, earthy seed with an anise-like character.
ingredient_descriptions.black_fermented_: Sweet, dark and umami-rich garlic with balsamic notes.
ingredient_descriptions.prepared_spice_m: The combined spice blend prepared for the marinade.
